title: RAD: Repeat After Death

Dodge your way through the many ghosts of your own movement to kill the guardian and get out of this looping purgatory.

In this game, players take on the role of Avelin, a girl who has just been recruited as a Grim Reaper Trainee after her death.  Avelin will undergo a series of trials: defeating impure souls, completing tasks from reaper mentors, and cleansing her inner seven deadly sins. All these trials must be completed for Avelin to become a full-fledged Grim Reaper and return to the world to reunite with her beloved once more.

title: AyoDance Mobile
about: AyoDance Mobile adalah game dance rhythm sosial dari MEGAXUS yang menghadirkan pengalaman menari mengikuti irama berbagai genre lagu populer. Pemain dapat bertanding di mode seperti Dance Battle, Team Battle, Club Dance, dan Couple Mode, serta mengekspresikan diri melalui avatar, fashion, dan dekorasi ruang. Selain kompetitif, game ini menjadi ruang sosial untuk berinteraksi, berkomunitas, dan bermain bersama teman secara online.

title: Granado Espada Mobile
about: Granado Espada Mobile adalah MMORPG dari MEGAXUS yang dapat dimainkan di mobile dan PC. Pemain dapat mengendalikan hingga tiga karakter sekaligus (MCC), membentuk tim dengan beragam peran untuk menjelajah dunia luas, menjalankan quest, dungeon, dan raid. Tersedia ratusan karakter, kostumisasi, fitur guild, serta mode PvE dan PvP yang menghadirkan pengalaman petualangan klasik dalam format modern.

title: VILLAINS : Battle Royale
about: Villains : Battle Royale adalah game aksi strategi dari MEGAXUS di mana pemain mengendalikan robot unik dengan kemampuan berbeda untuk bertarung di arena. Kumpulkan dan tingkatkan robot, susun strategi formasi, serta hadapi musuh dalam mode PvE dan PvP. Dengan kombinasi aksi cepat dan taktik, game ini menawarkan pengalaman pertempuran robot yang seru dan kompetitif.

title: Warteg Gelora-Restaurant Sims
about: Warteg Gelora adalah game simulasi restoran sosial dari MEGAXUS. Pemain berperan sebagai pelayan di sebuah “warung”, menerima dan melayani pesanan pelanggan mulai dari ojek online, pekerja kantoran, hingga staf parkir. Pemain harus mengingat pesanan dengan baik, menghidangkan tepat waktu, dan mengikuti protokol kesehatan selama pandemi. Game ini menghadirkan suasana keseharian Indonesia, gameplay santai tapi menantang, dan papan skor untuk bersaing dengan pemain lain.

title: Audition AyoDance
about: Audition AyoDance adalah game online dance rhythm dari MEGAXUS yang telah menjadi legenda sejak 2007. Pemain menari mengikuti irama beragam lagu, bersaing di berbagai mode seperti Beat Up, Battle Party, dan Couple Dance, sambil mengekspresikan diri lewat avatar dan fashion. Dengan komunitas yang kuat dan gameplay kompetitif, AyoDance tetap menjadi ruang sosial favorit para pemain hingga kini.

title: Stronghold of Humanity
about: Teh adalah minuman yang dibuat dari daun tanaman Camellia sinensis yang dikeringkan dan diseduh dengan air panas. Minuman ini telah menjadi bagian penting dari budaya banyak negara selama ribuan tahun, dikenal karena cita rasanya yang khas, aroma yang menenangkan, serta manfaat kesehatannya. Terdapat berbagai jenis teh seperti teh hijau, teh hitam, teh putih, dan teh oolong, yang masing-masing memiliki proses pengolahan dan karakteristik rasa berbeda. Selain dinikmati hangat, teh juga sering disajikan dingin, dicampur dengan susu, madu, atau rempah-rempah, menjadikannya salah satu minuman paling serbaguna dan populer di dunia.

When she comes across a bus ticket she did not buy to the mysterious Eigengrau Line, she is forced to confront traumas from the past and define a new course for her life.

about: Can you survive where no one is coming to save you? Lunar Crisis puts you in command of four stranded astronauts, fighting against time, isolation, and failing systems. Your mission: repair a damaged ship on a dead moon—and get everyone home alive.  This is more than a survival game. Lunar Crisis is a test of resourcefulness and pressure management, crafted to teach probabilistic thinking. Monitor, repair… or perish.  Lunar Crisis is volume 2 of the Mental Model Minis Series.

title: Gear Fight!
about: Gear Fight! A brand new type of puzzle-adventure game!  It's time to build a well oiled machine to take down these pesky enemies! First, place down some gears. Then, put your newly constructed factory to the test versus all of the evil enemies!

title: Mob Control
about: Mob Control delivers thrilling tower defense action where you grow your mob, deploy powerful champions, and crush enemy bases. Unlock collectible cards, conquer exciting modes, and climb the Champions League. Face new challenges, earn rewards, and discover fresh content as you rise to tower defense supremacy!

title: Epic Plane Evolution
about: Prepare for an exhilarating aerial adventure in Epic Plane Evolution, where your piloting skills and strategic upgrades determine how far your aircraft can soar. Launch your plane, navigate through diverse terrains, and evolve your aircraft to achieve maximum distance. Whether you're a casual gamer or a flight enthusiast, this game offers a captivating blend of action and strategy.

title: Archery Clash!
about: Enter the thrilling arena of Archery Clash, where the essence of shooter sports and cold weapon mastery culminates in the ultimate showdown. Embrace your role as a legendary archer, mastering the bow, spear, and axe to outsmart and outmaneuver your adversaries. With every precise throw and strategic strike, engage in epic 3D duels that test your precision, strategy, and archery skills. Are you ready to claim your victory and ascend to the ranks of the bowmasters?

title: Cup Heroes
about: Cup Heroes: Join the Adventure of a Lifetime!  Step into the whimsical world of Cup Heroes, where everyday cups turn into mighty heroes on an epic quest to save their beloved Queen! This fun-filled adventure will keep you hooked with its charming characters, exciting gameplay, and endless challenges.

title: Sand Loop
about: Tap, collect, and relax!  Experience the soothing satisfaction of flowing sand in Sand Loop — the ultimate relaxing tap game. Send buckets along a moving conveyor belt to collect sand by color, uncovering stunning artworks as grains fall with smooth, realistic physics. Every tap brings the picture to life as it gradually collapses in a cascade of color and motion. Simple to play, yet endlessly rewarding.

title: Woodturning 3D
about: The best woodturning simulator. Complete customer orders. Turn a piece of wood into the given shape. Cut (carve), polish, paint and add a stencil to your work. Earn money and improve your room.

title: Spring Lancer
about: Tap and drag on the screen to aim your spear. Lift your finger and the spear fires in that direction! Use the spear-sticking wall mechanic to control its movement with finesse. Take down every enemy to clear the stage!

title: Jetpack Master
about: Fly high! Soar to the finish line in this thrilling action game!  Swipe the screen to control your flight and reach the goal. It's challenging, but fun!

title: Switching Heroes
about: Switching Heroes is an idle RPG featuring fast-paced combat and real-time hero switching.  Swap heroes to unleash flashy skills, defeat enemies, and progress through stages automatically or manually. Grow stronger by upgrading stats and mastering strategic hero switches in increasingly challenging battles.

title: Sea Force
about: The game integrates the strategy gameplay of "Auto Chess", with ever-changing battle situations, each step testing strategy, and every voyage being a new journey.

title: Monster Survivors
about: Embark on an Epic Survival Adventure!  In a world overrun by monstrous creatures, only the bravest can survive. "Monster Survivors: Last Stand" is a thrilling action-packed game that challenges you to outlive the hordes of terrifying monsters. With its unique blend of strategy and fast-paced combat, this game puts your survival skills to the ultimate test.

title: Squad Busters
about: Squad Busters is a fast-paced, multiplayer action-strategy game, where 10 players battle to collect the most gems within a shrinking map. Players build, evolve, and manage squads featuring characters from Clash of Clans, Brawl Stars, and other franchises, utilizing unique abilities to defeat monsters, bosses, and other players in ~4-minute matches.

title: Clash Royale
about: Clash Royale is a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favourite Clash characters and much, much more. Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena.

title: Boom Beach
about: Come with a plan or leave in defeat! Welcome to Boom Beach, an epic combat strategy game where your brains and your troop’s brawn fight against the evil Blackguard. Attack bases to free enslaved islanders or create a task force with friends and other players to take on the enemy together, all while exploring and unlocking secrets of this beautiful archipelago. Scout, plan, then BOOM THE BEACH!

title: Terraria
about: The world is at your fingertips as you fight for survival, explore for fortune, and dig for glory. Delve deep into cavernous expanses, test your mettle in combat, or construct your own city!
platform: Nintendo Switch, XBOX, Android, iOS, PlayStation 4

title: Hex Warriors
about: Revolutionary RTS: Your Deck Commands a Million-Strong Army!  A brand-new Hexagonal Card Warfare Dominate the hexa battlefield where every tile flip sparks strategic revolution: ▷ Gold Rush: Secure mines for explosive growth ▷ Legendary Card: Summon legendary heroes to reverse tides

title: Chess Online - Clash of Kings
about: A classic board game of chess

title: Color Clash
about: In this card game players fight between red and blue to capture territory by coloring the arena. Each card unleashes unique units with special abilities to outmanoeuvre opponents and dominate the game.

title: Sniper Siege: Defend & Destroy
about: Experience the ultimate sniper adventure as you pick off enemies with a bolt action sniper rifle in diverse environments. Immerse yourself in thrilling stealth missions across urban jungles and treacherous mountain ranges, adapting your strategies to eliminate targets with precision. Master the art of marksmanship with authentic bolt action sniper rifles, executing perfect kills from incredible distances.

title: m00m world
about: Welcome to m00m world:  Build and decorate your own shipping-container home, hang out with friends, and play chill mini-games in a cozy cyberpunk MMO. Explore player-made worlds, team up for quests, and show your style with Digital Double™—fashion you can wear in real life.

title: Exhausted Man
about: Exhausted Man is a physics-comedy game, where you help an exhausted person get through a night that is crucial to him/her. Do everything while lying down, decorate the room to your taste, get tonight's ending through your choices.  Features: • The protagonist can only crawl… • The goal is clear tonight! But there is so much to do… • You can take a nap anytime…zZZ
platform: PC , PlayStation 5, iOS, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 4, XBOX, Android

title: Soul Knight Prequel
about: Soul Knight Prequel is a pixel-art action RPG featuring loot farming. Slash monsters to upgrade your power, or party up for treasure against the odds. Our newest ARPG continues to feature Soul Knight's familiar posse of chibi characters, while satiating the fans' hunger for more lore and quests!

title: Dumb Ways to Die
about: Enjoy 82 hilarious minigames as you attempt to collect all the charmingly dumb characters for your train station, achieve high scores and unlock the famous music video that started it all!

title: Fallout Shelter Online
about: Set in the award-winning Fallout universe, Fallout Shelter Online is an evolution of the original strategy RPG, with all-new hero teams, gameplay, and PvP.

title: Otherworld Legends
about: Otherworld Legends is a pixel roguelike action RPG. Master heroes of your choice, craft uniquely broken builds, and hack & pummel through a myriad of dungeons in a thrilling rampage. You are the warrior we've been waiting for. Here you will be able to: • Explore beautiful otherworlds like tranquil bamboo grooves, zen patios, grand underworld dungeon tombs or dreamy mirage palaces.  • Master heroes with fiery temper and overwhelming power.

title: Soul Knight
about: In a time of guns and swords, the magic stone that maintains the balance of the world is stolen by high-tech aliens. The world is hanging on a thin thread. It all depends on you retrieving the magical stone…" We honestly can't keep making up more tales of the magic stone. Let's just find some alien minions and shoot 'em up!

title: PlatyGuard: Swarm Slayer
about: PlatyGuard: Swarm Slayer is a 2D action roguelike platformer RPG set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, infused with biopunk and dark sci-fi flair. Survive the chaos, clash with mutant foes, and explore mysterious sites in this indie adventure!

title: Tavern Tale
about: Tavern Tale is an indie action RPG that blends cute 3D fantasy charm with dark roguelike adventure. The entire world has been sealed into a mysterious cube by an evil witch. Her mobs roam everywhere. But in a hidden corner stands a warm little tavern built by the dwarf Hank and his friends—the only safe shelter left inside the cube.

title: Meow Hunter
about: Meow Hunter is a pixel side-scrolling action RPG featuring adorable cat characters. It combines classic roguelike elements with the exhilarating combat experiences of platformer games.  In this meow-velous universe, you'll become a bounty hunter taking on missions across various planets in a space adventure to find energy and resources. Every hunt offers a fresh experience with a touch of retro arcade fun. Ready for it? The battle is set to unfold!

title: Xeno Command
about: Welcome aboard Xeno Command, a real-time strategy offline game fused with roguelike elements. Here you can lead a strong army with powerful heroes to defend the galaxy against Alien invasion in the challenging battles.  In the era of interstellar colonization, planets are in crisis. Heroes from different factions stand out to lead powerful armies against aliens and rescue the sufferers. You, the savior of the galaxy, are going to be the hero. Lead your army and combat alien invasions!

title: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS
about: This is a multiplayer battle royale action game where players fight with realistic firearms and explosives to be the last survivor on a shrinking battlefield.

title: Gig Life Tycoon
about: Struggling to make ends meet in the urban jungle is tough, but when you're responsible for providing for your loved ones back home, the stakes are even higher. Welcome to our survival simulation game, where you take on the role of a migrant worker in a bustling metropolis. Day after day, you hustle to survive by taking on different gig jobs, each one bringing you closer to your goal of securing a better life for your family.

title: Shadow of the Depth
about: Shadow of the Depth is a top-down action roguelike set in a dark medieval fantasy world. You'll take on the role of a warrior, assassin, mage, and other characters as you navigate dungeons of light and shadow to root out the monsters that ravage your home. Be prepared to step into the depths before you!

title: World of Kungfu: Dragon & Eagle
about: Begin your journey in World of Kungfu: Dragon & Eagle on mobile! Start your adventure with the trial version featuring Xiangyang City and its surroundings. Unlock the full experience with a one-time purchase, available either after your trial or immediately upon download. Experience the complete PC version on mobile! Journey from Bashu to Jiangdong and the Central Plains. Discover branching storylines and master diverse martial arts styles!

title: Home Design: Fix ASMR
about: Dive into the calming world of Home Hammer Fix ASMR, where you step into the shoes of a compassionate helper. Join a mother and her baby on a heartwarming journey to rebuild their cherished home. With each gentle tap and soothing sound, you'll embark on a therapeutic adventure, fixing, repairing, and renovating alongside them. From patching up walls to assembling furniture, every task brings you closer to transforming their space into a cozy sanctuary.

title: DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT
about: From legendary game creator Hideo Kojima comes a genre-defying experience, now expanded in this definitive DIRECTOR’S CUT.  In the future, a mysterious event known as the Death Stranding has opened a doorway between the living and the dead, leading to grotesque creatures from the afterlife roaming the fallen world marred by a desolate society.  As Sam Bridges, your mission is to deliver hope to humanity by connecting the last survivors of a decimated America.
descriptor: Horror, Character Appearance, Violence, Drugs, Blood, Language

title: Iron Force
about: Join global tank warfare!

title: World League Live!
about: World League Live! – Ultimate Multiplayer Soccer Game Experience exhilarating multiplayer soccer action on mobile! Join World League Live!, the fastest-paced multiplayer soccer game where you can challenge friends and thousands of players worldwide. Strike, score epic goals, and dominate the field with incredible power-ups. Ready to show who’s the G.O.A.T. in football? 🏆

title: Idle University
about: You’ve just been accepted to one of the nation’s most prestigious universities! As a new student at Idle University, you’re out to make a name for yourself, but you won't be able to do it alone! Recruit students to join you and lead your study group to academic greatness!

title: State of Survival: Zombie War
about: Survive with your strategy!

title: Hero Wars: Alliance
about: Hero Wars: Alliance is a strategy RPG where legendary heroes rise to save Dominion. The Archdemon has won, the Guardians have fallen — only you can turn the tide. Collect and upgrade 80+ heroes from six factions, build powerful team synergies, and lead them into battle. Compete in PvP Arena and draft battles, conquer PvE challenges like the Tower, explore limited-time adventures, and command mighty titans in epic guild wars. Collect. Upgrade. Conquer.

title: Project Entropy
about: Project Entropy is a Sci-Fi and role-playing game with space battles. Immerse yourself in this MMO experience where you'll command alien civilizations, conquer uncharted planets, and build Hero fleets. Challenge other players in intense PvP battles or team up with friends to take on challenging PvE encounters. Test your skills, strategy, and teamwork to emerge victorious in battle.

title: Elven Legacy
about: This sequel to Fantasy Wars continues its story after banishing the archdemon. The shadows of destruction begin to loom on the horizon once a human mage uncovers a dark and powerful secret dating back to the remote past of the Elven race.

title: Cuban Missile Crisis: Ice Crusade
about: Ice Crusade is a stand-alone expansion for post-apocalyptic real time strategy Cuban Missile Crisis. Ice Crusade continues the original story and adds new campaigns, battlegrounds and units.

title: Eternity: The Last Unicorn
about: Classic RPG, with lore based on Norse mythology. Travel through mesmerizing locations, meet fantasy characters and fight to protect Elven immortality.

title: Faces of War
about: Faces of War puts you in the heart of World War II – not as a distant commander, but as the leader on the ground. Combining the tactical depth of real-time strategy with the immediacy of direct control, it lets you issue precise orders or jump straight into battle as one of your soldiers.

title: Kapital: Sparks of Revolution
about: Sandbox economic simulation game about class struggle. European country is in a deep crisis. You are the mayor of the capital. Social unrest is inevitable. What price will you pay to save your people from anarchy?

title: Freight Tycoon Inc.
about: Freight Tycoon is an economic simulation game which challenges players’ management skills. It puts one into the shoes of an owner of a cargo transportation company. One has to evaluate the profitability of contracts, contact customers, and appoint drivers to deliver goods.

title: Restaurant Empire:Build & Cook
about: Turn a small eatery into a world-class restaurant empire! Customize your restaurant, create the perfect menu, and serve delicious meals to happy customers. Upgrade your kitchen, unlock new recipes, and compete with top chefs to become the ultimate restaurateur.

title: Off-Road Drive
about: Off-Road Drive, the off-road racing simulation for PC, is the first game ever to deliver a true-to-life, off-road, extreme racing experience. Players will take part in The Russian trophy, Off-Road Trial, Thai Trophy and many other events through the worst driving conditions with a variety of natural obstacles like swamps, rocks, snow and...

title: Omnibion War
about: Transform your high-tech space jet into a flying mech at the touch of a button as you blast your way through the galaxy in this frantic 3D shoot ‘em up. Take down thousands of Hellhounds one by one and prevent them from acquiring Omnibion, a dangerous ancient weapon.

title: NecroVision
about: War is Hell. NecroVision is a first-person shooter that takes gamers across the frantic battlegrounds of World War I and into a dark underworld of vampires, demons and dark magic.

title: NecroVision: Lost Company
about: NecroVisioN: Lost Company is the prequel to original horror FPS shooter, taking place before the NecroVisioN story begins. It contains a bunch of unique levels, characters, weapons and gameplay elements as well as new main hero that presents the original game story from opposite perspective.

title: Fantasy Wars
about: Fantasy Wars is a turn-based strategy game set in a fantasy world. Combining both classic strategy gameplay and sophisticated 3D graphics players can experience epic battles like never before. Taking place in a fantasy world of Human kingdoms, Orc clans, Dwarfs' citadels and Elven forests the player is thrust into a world of war and...

title: Gift of Parthax
about: Gift of Parthax is a 2D top-down action-arena game of gladiatorial wizardry! Customize your arsenal of countless spells, duel the masters of the arena with their mythological beasts, and rescue your friend Veleus from the powerful mage, Parthax!

title: Haimrik
about: Make words come to life in this action adventure unlike any other! Haimrik blends gameplay with the narrative of its story set in medieval times. Combined with crisp humor and rare visual style, Haimrik’s journey is sure to entertain. Word’s the word!

title: Horror Story: Hallowseed
about: Horror Story: Hallowseed is a story-driven psychological horror game. An obscure event causes two of your friends to disappear while you were camping in the woods. Left alone and stranded in an unknown place, you need to seek the answers about what happened, face the horror and find your friends.

title: IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946
about: Il-2 1946 includes all of the original IL-2 series content: IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™ and alternate histry campaigns of year 1946. What was years ago began as a one-aircraft study sim is now an astonishing anthology, with a whopping 229 flyable aircraft and over 300 aircraft total!

title: IL-2 Sturmovik: Cliffs of Dover Blitz Edition
about: Scramble to intercept in your RAF Spitfire or Hurricane. Or join huge formations of German or Italian Fighters and Bombers as they roar across the Channel towards London. Decide the fate of Britain!

title: Fall of Light: Darkest Edition
about: Fall of Light is a story-driven dungeon crawler set within a world consumed by Darkness, where an old warrior takes his daughter to see the last remnants of sunlight. Only together will they be strong enough to defeat the enemies born from the Shadow.

title: RC Cars
about: R.C. Cars is an exciting arcade racing game featuring the world of highly realistic toy radio controlled cars. Jump, accelerate, perform acrobatic feats in the air, and bounce on big hummocks, pits and bumps while contending with opponents for victory.

title: Terrain of Magical Expertise
about: Terrain of Magical Expertise is a game about a game! Take on the role of a White-Hat Hacker in this non-linear, story-driven, RPG adventure, featuring an original turn-based combat system, hundreds of unique enemies, and a full cast of voice actors. Do all it takes to win the Campaign of Champions!

title: In Fear I Trust
about: In Fear I Trust is a critically acclaimed first-person horror adventure. Explore eerie locations, solve puzzles and unravel the dark truth behind a secret soviet experiment in this story-driven psychological thriller.

title: Ascension to the Throne
about: Ascension to the Throne is a turn-based strategy game with RPG elements. In a vast fantasy world the hero will have to pass many tests on his way to victory. Enemies seek to stop players from regaining power and taking revenge. Gain new friends to aid you in reclaiming the throne.

title: BorderZone
about: BorderZone is a role-playing action with a complex non-linear storyline in which the player can choose a profession to his liking (mage, thief or soldier), learn the needed skills and spells, create a team of up to 5 dare-devils and leave for a trip full of unexpected discoveries in the world of Terra filled with various creatures.

title: Parkan 2
about: Parkan II is an original concept game that will allow you to feel as a pilot of a spacecraft lost somewhere in the universe. Become a pirate or mercenary, get money to buy the most powerful cruiser and show them all who is to be the new master of the galaxy. Unforgettable adventures in the Parkan II universe await you!

title: Death Track: Resurrection
about: Do you have what it takes to Survive? Death Track: Resurrection is a racing/action title that takes players into a post-apocalyptic, not-too-distant future where traditional sports have been replaced by far more violent entertainment.

title: Mystery Castle: The Mirror's Secret
about: Groth, the Soul Reaver, has kidnapped your daughter Jessica! Explore the dangerous world of the ancient castle and help release the captive souls whom you meet along the way. Can you solve the ingenious traps of the mysterious castle? Defeat Grot's magic and save Jessica!

title: Mystery of Unicorn Castle: The Beastmaster
about: Make your way past the ingenious traps of the Castle and overcome the beasts to restore the Unicorn for a victory over the forces of evil! Can you solve the Mystery of Unicorn Castle - The Beastmaster?

title: Brigade E5: New Jagged Union
about: Brigade E5: New Jagged Union is a tactical game that places gamers in the small tropical nation of Palinero on the verge of a civil war. The mission: hire a band of mercenaries and take control of the deteriorating situation before the country finds itself in complete ruin.

title: Tacticool
about: Tacticool is an action-packed 5v5 top-down shooter, where teamwork and tactics are your keys to victory. Variety of heroes and weapons allow you to play different styles. Immersive locations and moving environments can be your friend or foe. In this game you can break the rules and chase your enemies in cars and have a lot of fun.

title: Konung 2
about: The world of Konung is a unique and spacious fantasy land, that combines parts of known history with classical myths and the legends of the Chronicles, including immortal heroes, magical artefacts and ancient sorcery.

title: The Biggleboss Incident
about: A pointy-clicky comedy corporate thriller. Solve puzzles, get to know your colleagues, and unravel a sinister global conspiracy. All in a day's work.

title: Space Rangers: Quest
about: SPACE RANGERS: QUEST is a new text adventure in the world of Space Rangers with a touch of nostalgia. Save the Coalition from the new threat!

title: The Book of Desires
about: Explore an intriguing world in The Book of Desires, a thrilling Hidden Object Puzzle Adventure game! Ashley had a horrible dream where she traveled to a strange world. When she awoke she realized it was just a nightmare, but her reality turns out to be just as scary...

title: Khan Academy Kids
about: Khan Academy Kids is a free educational app for children ages 2–8, offering interactive lessons in reading, writing, math, and social-emotional development. Featuring colorful characters, engaging games, and adaptive learning, the app adjusts to each child's level as they progress. It's entirely free with no ads or subscriptions, making it accessible for families and educators alike. Content aligns with early learning standards.

title: A Dance of Fire and Ice
about: A Dance of Fire and Ice is a rhythm game where you tap the screen to make 2 circles travel along a twisting path to the beat of music.

title: Arknights
about: Take on the role of a key member of Rhodes Island, a pharmaceutical company that fights both a deadly infection and the unrest it leaves in its wake. Together with your leader Amiya, you’ll recruit Operators, train them, then assign them to various operations to protect the innocent and resist those who would thrust the world into turmoil.

title: All Who Wander
about: All Who Wander is a traditional roguelike with 30 levels and 10 character classes, inspired by games such as Pixel Dungeon. Fight or evade your enemies, discover powerful items, gain companions, and master over 100 abilities.

title: The Cozy Florist
about: Looking for a heartwarming game to relax without boredom? Eager to meet like-minded friends but afraid of social awkwardness? This game filled with flowers and surprises solves all your worries!

title: Resident Evil Requiem
about: Requiem for the dead. Nightmare for the living. Prepare to escape death in a heart-stopping experience that will chill you to your core.

title: LEGO BATMAN : LEGACY OF THE DARK KNIGHT
about: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight lets the player take on a journey that begins the origins of Batman as a young Bruce Wayne who trains with the League of Shadows to become the hero of Gotham City. You’ll encounter iconic villains such as The Joker, Penguin, Mr. Freeze, Poison Ivy and more. Story missions taken from memorable moments from the movies which interwove with each other as you solve a unique mystery in finding out who the main villain is.
platform: P C, XBOX, Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5

title: Mahkota dan Rindu
about: A Journey Through Time — Road to Revival A modern girl travels through dreams, witnessing the wisdom and courage of women across eras.  Ancient Intrigue Navigate tense court politics and rise step by step toward the throne.  Endless Fashion Stunning outfits and makeup allow limitless style transformations.  Romantic Companions Four loyal men join your adventure, shaping a heart-stirring love story.

title: Aha World: Doll Dress-Up Game
about: Aha World is a creative simulation game where players can design personalized characters, build dream homes, and explore diverse worlds.

title: DoubleDown Classic Slots
about: DoubleDown Classic Slots is a simulated casino slots game featuring a variety of themed slot machines. Players can enjoy the thrill of spinning reels, winning virtual coins, and unlocking new content within a purely virtual environment.

title: Boom Blast: Doomsday
about: Tear down enemy constructions as you beat 500 levels of mind-twisting demolishing puzzles. Experience all the fun while you are mastering the skill of cannon-firing! Beneath your feet lies the lost treasure island filled with danger and mysteries. To survive this unforgiving world, you must wield your greatest weapons: your unmatched wit, flawless aiming and absolute focus to fend off whatever evil may come!

title: Stormshot: Isle of Adventure
about: The game is set on the treacherous Isle of Adventure. Players take on the role of an intrepid adventurer and must rely on their wits to navigate through the challenges that lie ahead.

title: Hitman: Absolution
about: Branded a traitor and hunted by the Agency he once served, Agent 47 returns in lethal form.  Stalk your targets through elaborate environments designed to reward both quick thinking and patient planning. Strike silently from the shadows, or let your silverballers do the talking — whatever your approach, each of Absolution’s 20 missions is a contract killer’s happy hunting ground that invites exploration, experimentation and improvisation.
descriptor: Character Appearance, Violence, Drugs, Blood, Language

title: Misty Continent: Cursed Island
about: Explore the Cursed Island, build up your Stronghold! Gear yourself up for dangerous quests in the mist.  Craft unique Artifacts! Clear all your obstacles by having more treasures and powerful abilities that will aid your treasure hunts Make Friends Around the World! Gather your army and fight alongside your buddies!

title: Perimeter
about: Perimeter is an innovative Real-Time-Strategy game that pits players against each other or AI opponents in a life and death struggle to seize territory and establish crucial protective “perimeters.” Players will be introduced to the game’s unique terraforming feature, allowing them to move, build, construct and destroy the map...

title: Perimeter: Emperor's Testament
about: The game expands the story of the original Perimeter in a vast singleplayer campaign.

title: Pilot Brothers
about: The case of the stolen elephant! Elephant... Rare... Striped. ...has been kept for many years by an animal trader named Karbophos. Being unable to overcome abuse, it escaped and found a home at the zoo in our city. This is definitely Karbophos's work. To the zoo!

title: Pilot Brothers 2
about: Join the famed duo in their search for the serial maniac! The Pilot Brothers’ cat Arsenic has been kidnapped by Experimental Chef Sumo! Now the famed duo must track down Arsenic before he’s served with French fries. Per usual, this madcap detective adventure won’t be without its twists and turns, as the brothers must start by constructing a composite of the catnapper’s face with the help of a witness.

title: Pilot Brothers 3: Back Side of the Earth
about: Berdichev, Spring 1958. Sensible Brother Chief and his not-so-bright assistant, Brother Colleague saw a report in papers that in Tasmania number of rare animals was greatly reduced. Help Chief and Colleague to save poor elephants!

title: Star Wolves
about: Star wolves is a 3D space RPG with deep strategy and tactical elements. The game thrusts players into a world of freelance space hunters in the XXI-XXII century A.D. during a time of political crisis for the all-powerful Empire and the three mega-corporations that control all the known worlds.

title: Star Wolves 2
about: Six years have passed after the events of 2226 A.D. The balance in the galaxy has been restored as transgalactic corporations have been deported to the outskirts of the galaxy and deprived of their power. The Empire, just as before, continues to fight against the Aliens. As a rule armadas of battleships aren't used in such conflicts.

title: Star Wolves 3: Civil War
about: Large-scale battles have become a vestige of the past, depleting resources of conflicting parties. Settled space, where welfare and order had reigned, has become a cemetery for dead ships which is flooded with pirates and adventurists.

title: Stalingrad
about: Stalingrad is a real-time strategy title that places gamers in the middle of the most dramatic periods of World War II, covering major events from June 1942 till January 1943.

title: Dawn of Magic 2
about: The well-known Action-RPG Dawn of Magic will now be continued as the evil forces won't leave the world without a desperate struggle after the death of the monstrous immortal Modo. Peace is ruined, the fragile balance of the forces that remained for 10 years has fallen into pieces.

title: The Tomorrow War
about: The Tomorrow War is a space sim based on the trilogy of novels written by a famous Russian author, Alexander Zorich. These books are dedicated to the intergalactic war of two mighty empires. Along with the graduates of the military-space academy players will witness different stages of the conflict.

title: Re-Legion
about: Become The Prophet in a world of the future without the future! Lead your Cult in this cyberpunk RTS in the fight against evil corporations and heretics. Choose your creed, convert citizens, create an army and take over the city!

title: Real Warfare 1242
about: Real Warfare: 1242, is a realistic real-time strategy game based on authentic historic events.

title: Real Warfare 2: Northern Crusades
about: Real Warfare 2: Northern Crusades is the next installment in this series of realistic real-time strategy games covering various periods in the development of the present day civilization – from the Middle Ages to today.

title: Reign: Conflict of Nations
about: Reign: Conflict of Nations allows players to have a well thought-out and historically accurate system of building and assigning labor forces in cities, a large selection of scenario-based and random missions, an expansive and realistic technology tree, more than 150 types of military units and elaborated graphics and animations which brin

title: Shiny
about: Left to fend for himself after mankind abandoned the doomed planet Aurora, robot Kramer 227 must find a way through 20 action-packed levels and rescue his robotic friends before Aurora crashes into its sun.

title: Rig n Roll
about: Players will step into the shoes of a young man in the year 2014 as he arrives in California to pursue his dreams of road domination and capture the Californian cargo transportation market. There are miles of highways to conquer and cities and towns to reach as he becomes the greatest trucker on the highways.

title: Double Money
about: Get your net worth to the moon! First, play rock-paper-scissors to decide to goes first, then grow your money stack by picking up the best cards, make sure you have more money than your opponent. Simply tap a card to use it! Don't forget about red cards, you can reduce your opponent stack by using them, but so can do your opponent so be careful.

title: The Baby in Yellow

about: Do you like defense games? Then, choose thrilling Shooting Tower with a merge defense mechanism that gives you a sense of immersion.

title: Pizza Hit
about: Make a delicious pizza by throwing toppings to the pizza dough. Throw toppings at perfect timing to the spinning pizza dough. The look of the pizza is completely up to you. Be careful not to throw the toppings in the wrong way. Make a delicious pizza and be the best pizza maker.

title: Road Max
about: An shooting game that has been long waited by many gamers is finally here.  You must now reclaim the city that has been occupied by the rebels.  You have multiple weapons as the best special agent. Dodging bullets and rockets raining from behind the truck You must attack the chasing enemies. If you can stay calm when all the rebels are after you Road Max is the game for you.

title: Robot WW2
about: In 2080, human beings coexists with robots with intelligence. Robots make life of human beings more convenient.  However, robots suddenly start controlling people, a war against them, and trying to dominate the world. Many cities got destroyed and people are on the verge of losing the war.

title: Space Assassin
about: Do you like action games? Meet a simple but strategic game, Space Assassin.  Bring different types of weapon and get through the spaceship occupied by enemies. Slay them with a long sword or use various weapon to eliminate robots. Robots can monitor every movement. If you walked into their sights, they would start attacking you. Each boss has different attack patterns. Shooting multiple or wide shots at a time, using electric guns, or spraying poison to inflicit lasting damage.

title: Stepping Challenge: K-Game Run
about: Stepping Challenge is a hyper-casual game where you touch the screen and climb up the cubes. Don't worry if you're not sure how to play! A simple finger touch is enough to climb up the cube. Try 5 different modes with your quick finger movement and judgment. Collect golds and get a character with special skills!

title: Zombie Defense: The Bridge
about: Finally, the strategic tower defense game that many gamers have been eagerly anticipating has been released.  Can you protect the base camp from the zombies?  It is a game where you protect the base camp on the bridge, which is guarded by the last survivors. Join the strategic defense game, Zombie Defense: The Bridge, right now.

title: Zombie Mansion
about: This is a city invaded and destroyed by zombies. The fact that you live in this city means that you will soon be infected by the zombie virus. Zombies have entered your mansion and are after you.  You need to get a gun in a mansion and kill zombies. Also, you have to get food for a long fight.  Among zombies, your family or close friends will become zombies and attack you without recognizing you.

title: Tank Adventure
about: Every part of the world has been invaded by savage aliens. These aliens have invaded and conquered our world.  You can drive the world's best tank in the world. You can replace the cannon with a more powerful one, and even change the tank's body to a faster and stronger one.  Choose and combine the cannon and body to create the most powerful tank, and defeat the enemies.

title: ZomRun
about: This is a city that has been invaded and destroyed by zombies. The zombies roam the city, targeting people. The zombies attack living humans to satisfy their thirst for blood, turning them into more zombies. Zombies have taken control of the entire world. Now is the time to fight for survival in the midst of the zombie virus apocalypse. The fact that you live in this city means you will soon be infected by the zombie virus. The zombies will immediately rush towards you once they spot you.

title: Don`t shoot the bird!
about: Touch the targets flying in from both sides. You can get a different score based on the color of targets. Don't shoot the bird or bomb! You will lose your score. Clear a mission by shooting the mission color displayed at the right bottom. Enjoy!

title: Crazy Tennis 2021
about: Simple tennis game in 3D. There's a target on the other side of the tennis net. You need to hit the tennis ball at exact timing and destroy the targets. Hit the ball back when it returns. Continue rally by hitting the target. Each target has a different HP and it has to be zero to destroy. As you record a higher score, the ball will show better visual effects. Collect gold to buy different types of a tennis racket. Upgrade targets to increase the chance to appear rare targets.

title: Jumping Tiger 2021
about: Animals from all over the world are enjoying the Olympics. The tiger is trying to win the SKY high jump. On the trampoline equipped with rocket fuel, the tiger is getting ready to jump to the sky. With the given fuel, control the power to jump as high as possible.  Reach the highest point before the fuel runs out. Upgrade the speed and fuel to jump higher.

title: Bubble Pop Burst: Bubble Shoot
about: Classic Bubble Shooter game with addictive shooting experience!

title: Horror Mansion
about: After wandering about on a dark night, you entered the Horror Mansion. You need to find the exit through all those doors. Ghosts can hear every single sound you make including footsteps, doors, etc. Ghosts will follow you and try to block your way. Leave ghosts out and escape through the door on the first floor. Wish you good luck.

title: ZOO PARTY: KONG BATTLE
about: There's a zoo where many animals peacefully share to live.  One day, King Kong brought savage animals to the zoo and invaded it. Meet the young but brave Baby Tiger that came forward to save the peaceful zoo. Go around the zoo and defeat King Kong with the Baby Tiger. The Baby Tiger starts a tough fight to stop the fierce attack of King Kong.

title: Revolver Saloon
about: Revolver Saloon is a game that can improve your agility. Show your ability in shooting the targets appearing from random directions. Don't panic under any unexpected circumstances. Don't shoot a bomb. For some targets that are not destroyed at once, you need to shoot them several times to completely destroy them. Collect alphabets from the targets to enter Fever Time. Get coins to increase the time limit, damage, and so on.

about: Mahjong, also known as Mahjong Solitaire or Shanghai Solitaire

title: Houseplant 2021
about: Grow a pet plant day and night in real-time. You can grow it delicately and attentively by letting it enjoy the cool breeze, listen to music, etc.  Play sweet classic music for your pet plant and enjoy a good rest. Growing a pet plant will comfort you when you're tired of your daily lives.

title: Solitaire : Classic Card Games

title: Captain Kitty
about: Anyone can catch fish without any knowledge of fishing. Grab your fishing rod, get on the boat and go out to sea. Explore the unknown sea and catch numerous fish. Throw a fishing line and reel numerous fish in.  The more fish you catch, the more gold you earn. Upgrade the fishing line to throw it even deeper. Upgrade the hook so you can catch more fish.

title: Spider Solitaire
about: Relax and Train your Brain with the Spider solitaire Classic Card Game!

title: Lunatic Homerun
about: Hit all various types of items away in the baseball park. Choose a direction and hit it strongly. The item is sailed out of the stadium and fallen into a village. The further you hit the item, the more scores & coins you get. How far can you hit the item?

You should avoid obstacles that appear randomly. Use the jump board to perform a spinning movement. The more you spin, the further you can get. If you made a mistake in landing, you could get severely injured. You could either fall over a cliff or bump into a moving train.

title: Virus Apocalypse
about: All creatures on earth are disappearing due to the worst virus we've ever experienced.  Due to a failed experiment at the world's largest corporation, a deadly virus is quickly spreading out to the world. The deadly virus can only be stopped by you who can develop a vaccine. You're the only person who has an antibody for the virus. You need to develop a vaccine in your vaccine development institute. Take the vaccine to the virus research centers where the virus is born and eliminate them.
